lobby: Main menu with green Play button, level number, and bottom nav bar (Shop/Leaderboard/Home/Journey/Settings)
gameplay: 3D parking lot with colored cars, bottom holder (7 slots), and 4 booster icons
win: Level complete popup - PERFECT/stars, rewards coins, green Continue button
fail_outofspace: Out of Space! popup - holder full, green Add Space button (costs coins)
fail_continue: Continue? popup - warns about losing life/streak/punchout, green Play On button (costs coins)
fail_result: Level Failed popup - shows rewards, green Try Again button
ingame_setting: In-game Settings popup - Sound/Music toggles, Resume (green) and Quit (red) buttons
ingame_quit_confirm: Are you sure? popup - warns lose 1 life, red Quit button
ad: Fullscreen interstitial ad (various formats, X button appears after delay)
ad_install: App install/store page shown after ad interaction
shop: Shop page with bundles and coin packs (real money ₩ prices). Bottom nav bar visible
leaderboard: Leaderboard page with Weekly/World/Country tabs. Bottom nav bar visible
journey: Journey map showing level progression and city milestones. Bottom nav bar visible
setting: Settings page with Notifications/Sound/Music toggles and Support button. Bottom nav bar visible
profile: Profile popup with avatar, level, General Stats (wins). X close button top-right
profile_edit: Edit Profile popup over Profile - avatar/frame/name/token selection, Save button
lobby_keyblaze: Key Blaze event popup - multiplier tabs (x1-x100), reward path, X close top-right
lobby_keyblaze_info: Key Blaze info overlay - tutorial, Tap to Continue at bottom
lobby_streakrace: Streak Race event popup - leaderboard with flags, multiplier tabs, X close top-right
lobby_streakrace_info: Streak Race info overlay - tutorial, Tap to Continue at bottom
lobby_dailytask: Daily Task popup - task checklist (Win N levels), Bonus Mission, X close
lobby_skylift: Sky Lift event - vertical tower with checkpoints/chests, X close top-right
lobby_skylift_info: Sky Lift info overlay - tutorial, Tap to Continue at bottom
lobby_missiongarage: Mission Garage event - Stage tabs, quest list with progress bars, X close
lobby_missiongarage_info: Mission Garage info overlay - tutorial, Tap to Continue at bottom
lobby_skyrally: Sky Rally start popup - stage prizes, green Start! button, X close
lobby_skyrally_race: Sky Rally race view - players on lanes racing to checkered flag, X close
lobby_endlesscoast: Endless Coast event - grid of offers (FREE with ad / ₩ purchase), X close
lobby_punchout: Punch Out event popup - shows countdown to next challenge or entry, X close
lobby_citydeal: City Deal popup - limited time bundle offer with ₩ price, X close
